stories.title: Trump unleashes curse-filled social media rant at Iran after U.S. rescues colonel
stories.description: In a profanity-laden post on Truth Social, President Trump lashed out at Iran and injected new volatility into the conflict, hours after U.S. forces carried out a high-risk rescue mission.

stories.title: U.S. searches for airman shot down in Iran, while Trump posts ultimatum
stories.description: At the start of the sixth week of war, U.S. forces search for a missing airman and President Trump reiterates his ultimatum for Iran to open the Straight of Hormuz.

stories.title: Iran war enters its 6th week as military searches for downed jet crew member
stories.description: The war in Iran enters its 6th week as the search continues for the missing U.S. service member who bailed out of a fighter jet shot down over Iran on Friday.

stories.title: Trump's criticism of NATO raises questions of whether — or how — the U.S. could leave
stories.description: President Trump has complained that some NATO states aren't letting him use bases in the war against Iran. His criticism has left many wondering if the U.S. may try to withdraw from the alliance.

stories.title: What we know about downed F-15 jet and US airmen's rescue
stories.description: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.

stories.title: Search for missing airman presents serious test for US
stories.description: The stakes could rise further if the weapons system officer of the downed F15 Eagle plane is captured by Iran.

stories.title: US says it has arrested relatives of late Iranian ​general Qasem ​Soleimani
stories.description: The niece and grand-niece of Qasem Soleimani are in the custody of US Immigration and Customs Enforcement, officials said.

stories.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.

stories.title: Experts dispute US account of deadly Iran sports hall strike in Lamerd
stories.description: Six weapons experts have contested the US claim that video evidence suggests an Iranian missile could have hit the hall.

stories.title: International law experts allege violations in Iran war
stories.description: The White House says it is making the entire region safer by eliminating short and long-term threats.

stories.title: 'This has got me worried': Iranians fear what comes next after US strike on Karaj bridge
stories.description: President Trump has warned Iran of strikes on bridges and electric power plants if its leaders do not agree to his terms to end the war.

stories.title: Iran's focus on survival means same regime still firmly in place
stories.description: Tehran is showing resilience despite Trump's claims of regime change, writes BBC Persian editor Amir Azimi.

stories.title: 'I haven't slept for days': Iranians describe mounting desperation after a month of war
stories.description: Ordinary people from various parts of Iran describe expanding strikes, economic pain and fear of repression.

stories.title: Iran's two largest steel plants shut down due to air strikes, companies say
stories.description: The strikes, which Iran says were first launched by Israel in co-ordination with the US last week, could cause major damage to the Iranian economy.

stories.title: 'Be serious... don't speak every day': Macron criticises Trump approach to Iran war
stories.description: The comments were an apparent jab at the US leader's sometimes contradictory stance on the US-Israeli war against Iran.

stories.title: Iranian Nobel laureate suffered suspected heart attack in prison, family says
stories.description: Narges Mohammadi's brother says he fears her life is in imminent danger and she needs to be transferred to a hospital.

stories.title: UK and allies discuss sanctions to stop Iran blocking Strait of Hormuz
stories.description: Yvette Cooper said coordinated diplomatic and economic measures are required to reopen the shipping lane.

stories.title: Trump says Iran war objectives 'nearing completion' in address to nation
stories.description: The US president's first televised address of the conflict with Iran did little to quell uneasy markets.

stories.title: When will the Iran war end? Tracing the Trump administration's timelines
stories.description: Experts say many US presidents have offered a timeline for a conflict - only to then shift their estimates.

stories.title: Israel launches new strikes on Lebanon, forces closure of Syria border crossing
stories.description: Israeli airstrikes on Beirut and southern Lebanon on Sunday killed at least 11 people, including a family of six, and wounded dozens more. The attacks also prompted Syria to temporarily close its main border crossing with Lebanon, as Israel's conflict with Hezbollah intensifies.

stories.title: War in the Middle East: the US rescues missing airman from Iran
stories.description: Jim Townsend, Former US Deputy Assistant Secretary of Defense fir European and NATO Policy, is our guest.

stories.title: US war on Iran: Trump pressures allies in war effort but offers 'no role in strategy'
stories.description: Kethevane Gorjestani is pleased to welcome Ian Lesser, Author and Senior Director for Foreign and Security Policy at the German Marshall Fund (GMF). According to Mr. Lesser, the current crisis in the Middle East has sparked a systemic shock to the global order. What we are witnes...

stories.title: The week in pictures: Mideast war, a lunar mission and Holy Week processions
stories.description: The war in the Middle East showed no sign of ending as President Donald Trump exchanged threats with the Iranian regime and jittery markets sent oil prices surging. The week also saw NASA launch its first crewed lunar mission in half-a-century, Italy miss out on a third successiv...

stories.title: Inside the race to rescue a downed US airman in Iran
stories.description: President Donald Trump on Sunday hailed a daring rescue of a downed US airman in central Iran, but Tehran insisted the mission was “foiled”, leaving the world to sift fact from fiction amid conflicting reports and viral images.

stories.title: Middle East war live: ‘Open the F***in' Strait’, Trump says, or US will target Iran's infrastructure on Tuesday
"We got him!": US rescues aviator whose fighter jet was shot down in Iran
stories.description: The United States said Sunday it rescued a service member missing behind enemy lines since Iran downed a fighter jet, as President Donald Trump escalated pressure on Tehran with a new looming deadline to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Pope Leo condemns ‘violence of war’ in first Easter Mass amid Iran conflict
stories.description: Pope Leo XIV celebrated his first Easter Mass as pontiff with a condemnation of “the violence of war that kills and destroys,’’ amid the US-Israeli war on Iran and Russia’s campaign in Ukraine. In his homily, the pontiff singled out those who wage war, abuse the weak and prioriti...

stories.title: US aviator missing after Iran shot down fighter jet has been rescued
stories.description: David Smith, Guardian's Washington bureau chief, is our guest.

stories.title: Ramstein: Controversy in Germany over military base's role in Middle East war
stories.description: Although Germany insists it is not a party to the war in Iran, the U.S. airbase in Ramstein plays a key role in coordinating American military operations causing controversy.

stories.title: Has the humanitarian crisis in Gaza been ignored?
stories.description: Conditions in Gaza worsen amid the United States-Israel war on Iran.

stories.title: Trump threatens Iran in expletive-filled social media post
stories.description: Donald Trump unleashed a vulgar online tirade against Iran’s leaders as his deadline for reopening the Strait of Hormuz.

stories.title: Israel continues deadly attacks on Gaza while striking Iran, Lebanon
stories.description: Israel has kept up its attacks on Gaza while striking Iran and Lebanon, killing at least four Palestinians on Sunday.

stories.title: Frustration grows as Iran’s wartime internet shutdown breaks grim record
stories.description: Since January, Iran's near total internet blackout has impacted jobs and businesses.

stories.title: Video captures Iranian missile striking residential building in Haifa
stories.description: Video captured the moment of a direct hit by an Iranian missile on a residential building in Israel’s Haifa.

stories.title: OPEC+ agrees to hike oil output, warns of slow recovery after attacks
stories.description: The rise is largely symbolic as some key members are unable to raise ​production amid the US-Israel war on Iran.

stories.title: At least 14 people killed in Israeli strikes across Lebanon
stories.description: Hezbollah fires projectiles at northern Israel while Israeli troops push deeper into southern Lebanon.

stories.title: Iranian missile strikes industrial area in southern Israel
stories.description: Video captured the moment an Iranian missile hit the Ramat Hovav industrial area in southern Israel.

stories.title: Trump threatens ‘hell’ for Iran over Hormuz Strait as deadline approaches
stories.description: US president threatens to strike power plants and bridges on Tuesday in an expletive-laden social media post.

stories.title: Mearsheimer: No signs of quick end to US-Israel war on Iran
stories.description: US political scientist John Mearsheimer argues Israel, not Iran, is the Middle East country that is ‘highly aggressive’.

stories.title: US forces rescue 2 airmen downed in Iran; Trump says crew member injured but ‘safe’
stories.description: United States President Donald Trump said on Sunday that US forces had safely recovered a second airman downed in Iran, calling it “one of the most daring search and rescue operations in US history”. The announcement came as Iran launched missiles and drones at Israel and Kuwait ...

stories.title: EU urged to drop sanctions on import of Russian oil and gas
stories.description: WARSAW: The European Union should end sanctions on Russian oil and gas imports, take steps to restore Druzhba oil pipeline flows and end the war in Ukraine to tackle the energy crisis stemming from the war in Iran, Slovak Prime Minister Robert Fico said on Saturday. Fico said in ...

stories.title: US president weighs broader cabinet shake-up
stories.description: WASHINGTON: US President Donald Trump is considering a bro­ader cabinet shake-up in the wake of Attorney General Pam Bondi’s removal this week, as he grows increasingly frustrated with the political fallout from the war with Iran, five people familiar with internal White House di...

stories.title: Tehran says Islamabad talks depend on terms and conditions of any negotiations
stories.description: https://www.dawn.com/news/1988683

stories.title: ‘This is all embarrassing and juvenile’: Trump draws criticism for fiery, expletive-laden message on Iran
stories.description: US President Donald Trump did not take a break from his polarising rhetoric on Easter Sunday, delivering an expletive-laden attack on Iran that sparked criticism on Capitol Hill and beyond. In his message, he warned Iran that “you’ll be living in hell” if the Strait of Hormuz was...

stories.title: UK Navy reports critical situation in Persian Gulf region
stories.description: 27 attacks on ships and port infrastructure have been reported since March 1, and the number of ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz daily has dropped from 138 to eight

stories.title: UK Defense Ministry denies reports of its destroyer being hit off Lebanese coast
stories.description: Israel’s Channel 14 earlier cited assessments that a missile fired by Hezbollah was able to damage the ship

stories.title: Hezbollah mistakenly fires at UK vessels — Israeli TV
stories.description: Israel’s Channel 14 pointed out that preliminary Israeli assessments indicate the missile may have damaged the ship

stories.title: Tehran to strike enemy infrastructure similar to that attacked in Iran — top diplomat
stories.description: Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said that Iran will attack US infrastructure in the Persian Gulf region

stories.title: Top Russian, Chinese diplomats call for de-escalation of situation in Persian Gulf — MFA
stories.description: According to the statement, in the context of Middle East issues, Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov and his Chinese counterpart Wang Yi discussed ways to strengthen Russian-Chinese cooperation in various international forums, especially at the UN

stories.title: Russia, Iran emphasize need to stop reckless attacks on Bushehr NPP — Foreign Ministry
stories.description: The ministry noted that the conversation "emphasized the inadmissibility of creating threats to the lives and health" of the plant’s personnel and "the risks of a radioactive disaster for the entire region"

stories.title: Iran announces new wave of attacks on Israeli, US military targets in region
stories.description: According to its information, the strikes targeted a gathering of US servicemen in the UAE, an Israeli vessel in the port of Jebel Ali in the UAE, and a US military base in Kuwait

stories.title: News agency reveals number of Iranian students, education workers killed in conflict
stories.description: In addition, 245 students have died as a result of attacks on Iran since the start of the conflict

stories.title: Iran hits oil infrastructure in Israel, US military base in Kuwait — army
stories.description: According to a statement cited by the Fars news agency, Iranian servicemen have, since this morning

stories.title: US, Iran may reach deal by Monday — Trump
stories.description: The reporter also noted that, according to the White House, if Tehran does not agree to a deal, Trump intends to take control of Iranian oil

stories.title: US president threatens strikes on Iran’s energy, civilian infrastructure
stories.description: Donald Trump called on Iranian leaders to open the Strait of Hormuz, claiming that otherwise the country "will be living in hell

stories.title: Trump confirms rescue of second crewmember of fighter jet in Iran
stories.description: According to the US president, the serviceman was injured

stories.title: Two power plants in Kuwait damaged in Iranian attack — energy ministry
stories.description: According to the ministry, desalination units have also sustained damage

stories.title: At least three people killed in missile attack in southwest Iran
stories.description: The governor of the Kohgiluyeh and Boyer-Ahmad Province says that the exact number of dead and injured people can be significantly higher

stories.title: Explosions rock Isfahan in Central Iran — TV
stories.description: According to Al Hadath, the strikes are delivered by US and Israeli forces

stories.title: DPRK slams U.S. for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang
stories.description: The Democratic People's Republic of Korea (DPRK) has slammed the United States for orchestrating efforts to tighten financial sanctions against Pyongyang.
